The '''Bakuran Defense Fleet''', formed as the '''Bakuran Defense Militia''',<ref name="TAB-SB">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref> and known also the '''Bakuran Alliance system defense force''', was the reconstituted military force of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] created after the [[Invasion of Bakura]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. It was not only meant to defend Bakura against a second [[Ssi-ruuvi]] attack, but also any exterior governments — the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] or the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] — that again tried to force its views upon Bakura.

The Fleet itself centered around [[General Purpose Attack Fighter]]s, [[Namana-class light cruiser|''Namana''-class light cruisers]], and [[Bakura-class destroyer|''Bakura''-class destroyers]], which were designed and produced by the Bakurans themselves. As of [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]], only four of the latter ([[Intruder (Namana-class)|''Intruder'']], ''[[Watchkeeper]]'', [[Defender (Bakura-class)|''Defender'']], [[Sentinel (Bakura-class)|''Sentinel'']]) had been built with [[Hyperwave inertial momentum sustainer]] (HIMS). Even though the force had unknown strength, only these four ships were equipped with this experimental technology because of cost and the time consuming process. Until its destruction, the ''Intruder'' served as the Fleet's flagship. ''[[Dominant]]'', [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]], and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] also formed part of the fleet.

From the Fleet's formation until his death in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], Commander [[Pter Thanas]] was the Fleet's commander. From Thanas' death until his own death the next year, Admiral [[Hortel Ossilege]] held that position. Later, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grell Panib]] was Commander of the Defense Fleet. The Fleet only saw action in three known conflicts: the [[Battle of Centerpoint Station (Corellian Crisis)|Battle of Centerpoint Station]] (where it sustained massive casualties), the [[Battle of Bakura (28 ABY)|Battle of Bakura]], and the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], namely the [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Defense of Mon Calamari]], and the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar|Recapture of Coruscant]].
